## SequenceNode class

An AST node that concatenates patterns in order.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class SequenceNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new SequenceNode([new TextNode("a"), new RawNode("[0-9]")]).toString();
// "a[0-9]"
```
